description: User pivots between agents within one session: market_research → portfolio_health → financial_calculator. Tests that history does not anchor the classifier when the new query clearly indicates a different agent.

turns.text: yo whats happening with semiconductors lately
Semis have been volatile — AI-driven names (NVDA, AVGO, TSM) have led, while memory and analog have lagged. Want a deep dive on a specific name or the sector overall?
ok now check my portfolio for me
Pulling a health check on your account now — concentration, performance vs benchmark, and any flags.
if i add 1000 a month at 9 percent how much in 20 years

assertions.notes: Slang ('yo'), lowercase, no ticker. Topic-only research.
Topic switch — must NOT inherit market_research from prior turn.
